data[0]  = 32'b000000000001_00000_000_00001_0010011; // addi x1, x0, 1
data[1]  = 32'b0000100_00001_00000_000_00000_0100011; // sb x1, 128(x0)

data[2]  = 32'b000001111111_00000_000_00001_0010011; // addi x1, x0, 127
data[3]  = 32'b0000100_00001_00000_000_00001_0100011; // sb x1, 129(x0)

data[4]  = 32'b111111111111_00000_000_00001_0010011; // addi x1, x0, -1
data[5]  = 32'b0000100_00001_00000_000_00010_0100011; // sb x1, 130(x0)

data[6]  = 32'b111110000000_00000_000_00001_0010011; // addi x1, x0, -128
data[7]  = 32'b0000100_00001_00000_000_00011_0100011; // sb x1, 131(x0)

data[8]  = 32'b000010000000_00000_000_00010_0000011; // lb  x2, 128(x0)
data[9]  = 32'b000010000000_00000_100_00011_0000011; // lbu x3, 128(x0)
data[10] = 32'b000010000010_00000_000_00100_0000011; // lb  x4, 130(x0)
data[11] = 32'b000010000010_00000_100_00101_0000011; // lbu x5, 130(x0)
data[12] = 32'b000010000000_00000_001_00110_0000011; // lh  x6, 128(x0)
data[13] = 32'b000010000000_00000_101_00111_0000011; // lhu x7, 128(x0)
data[14] = 32'b000010000010_00000_001_01000_0000011; // lh  x8, 130(x0)
data[15] = 32'b000010000010_00000_101_01001_0000011; // lhu x9, 130(x0)
data[16] = 32'b000010000000_00000_010_01010_0000011; // lw  x10, 128(x0)

data[17] = 32'b0000100_01010_00000_010_01000_0100011; // sw x10, 136(x0)
data[18] = 32'b0000100_01000_00000_010_01100_0100011; // sw x8,  140(x0)
data[19] = 32'b0000100_00101_00000_010_10000_0100011; // sw x5,  144(x0)

data[20] = 32'b00010010001101000101_01100_0110111; // lui x12, 0x12345
data[21] = 32'b011001111000_01100_000_01100_0010011; // addi x12, x12, 0x678
data[22] = 32'b0000100_01100_00000_001_10100_0100011; // sh x12, 148(x0)
data[23] = 32'b000010010100_00000_101_01101_0000011; // lhu x13, 148(x0)
data[24] = 32'b000010001000_00000_010_01011_0000011; // lw x11, 136(x0)
